title: Weak Topic Reset
goal: Identify the weakest repeated concept and rebuild the core idea before timed practice.
teacherAction: Ask one diagnostic question, explain the concept briefly, then solve one guided example.
classSteps: Ask the student to explain where the confusion starts.
Show one corrected method with minimum wording.
Give one similar question for independent attempt.

title: Saved Error Correction
goal: Convert saved mistakes into correction rules the student can reuse.
teacherAction: Review one saved error pattern and require the student to state the corrected rule aloud.
classSteps: Compare the wrong method with the correct method.
Write one correction rule and one prevention rule.

title: Revision Queue Exit Check
goal: Confirm that the student can recall and apply the corrected idea without help.
teacherAction: Use one revision queue item as the final independent check before assigning homework.
classSteps: Ask the student to solve without notes.
Assign one route task only if the exit check is correct.
